mapper.sql: COALESCE(SUM(br.bet_amount), 0) AS totalBetAmount, COALESCE(SUM(br.valid_bet_amount), 0) AS totalValidBetAmount, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT br.user_id) AS userCount, COALESCE(SUM(br.can_win_amount), 0) AS totalCanWinAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN br.status = 1 THEN br.win_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalWinAmount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN br.status = 1 THEN COALESCE(br.bet_amount,0) - COALESCE(br.win_amount,0) WHEN br.status = 0 THEN COALESCE(br.bet_amount,0) - COALESCE(br.can_win_amount,0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS totalWinLose
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(br.bet_amount), 0) AS totalBetAmount, COALESCE(SUM(br.valid_bet_amount), 0) AS totalValidBetAmount, COUNT(*) AS totalOrderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT br.user_id) AS totalUserCount, COALESCE(SUM(br.can_win_amount), 0) AS totalCanWinAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN br.status = 1 THEN br.win_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalWinAmount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN br.status = 1 THEN COALESCE(br.bet_amount,0) - COALESCE(br.win_amount,0) WHEN br.status = 0 THEN COALESCE(br.bet_amount,0) - COALESCE(br.can_win_amount,0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS totalWinLose FROM t_bet_record br WHERE

SELECT br.lottery_id AS lotteryId, MAX(l.name) AS lotteryName, COUNT(DISTINCT br.issue_no) AS issueCount,
FROM t_bet_record br LEFT JOIN t_lottery l ON l.id = br.lottery_id WHERE
GROUP BY br.lottery_id ORDER BY totalBetAmount DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(br.bet_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS label, COALESCE(SUM(br.bet_amount), 0) AS totalBetAmount, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN br.status = 1 THEN COALESCE(br.bet_amount,0) - COALESCE(br.win_amount,0) WHEN br.status = 0 THEN COALESCE(br.bet_amount,0) - COALESCE(br.can_win_amount,0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS totalWinLose FROM t_bet_record br WHERE
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(br.bet_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY label ASC

SELECT br.issue_no AS label, COALESCE(SUM(br.bet_amount), 0) AS totalBetAmount, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN br.status = 1 THEN COALESCE(br.bet_amount,0) - COALESCE(br.win_amount,0) WHEN br.status = 0 THEN COALESCE(br.bet_amount,0) - COALESCE(br.can_win_amount,0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS totalWinLose FROM t_bet_record br WHERE
GROUP BY br.issue_no ORDER BY label ASC

SELECT br.lottery_id AS lotteryId, MAX(l.name) AS lotteryName, COUNT(DISTINCT br.issue_no) AS issueCount,
FROM t_bet_record br LEFT JOIN t_lottery l ON l.id = br.lottery_id WHERE
GROUP BY br.lottery_id ORDER BY totalWinLose
ASC DESC

SELECT br.user_id AS userId, MAX(br.platform_user_id) AS platformUserId, COALESCE(SUM(br.bet_amount), 0) AS totalBetAmount, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN br.status = 1 THEN COALESCE(br.bet_amount,0) - COALESCE(br.win_amount,0) WHEN br.status = 0 THEN COALESCE(br.bet_amount,0) - COALESCE(br.can_win_amount,0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS totalWinLose FROM t_bet_record br WHERE
GROUP BY br.user_id ORDER BY totalWinLose
ASC DESC
